hero.tagline: Advanced aerospace systems. Battlefield technologies. Private military contracting. The future of defense is forged here.

cards.label: Aerospace Command
cards.title: Fleet Operations
cards.text: Javelins. Krakens. Idris frigates in formation. We don't ask for orbital superiority ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” we take it. Capital ship fleet ops, escort coordination, and force projection across every system that matters.

cards.label: R&D Division
cards.title: Battlefield Technologies
cards.text: Blueprinted weapons. Custom loadouts. Gear that hasn't hit the market yet. Our R&D arm makes sure every operator hits the field with an unfair advantage.

cards.label: FOG ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” Forward Operations Group
cards.title: Private Military Contracting
cards.text: Ship boarding. Infiltration. High-value target extraction. FOG doesn't do peacekeeping ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” we do results. Elite, membership-limited, and available for hire.

events.title: FOG Qualification
events.desc: CQB drills & boarding procedures. Full kit required.

events.title: Supply Run
events.desc: Stanton logistics convoy. Haulers & escorts needed.

events.title: Org Night
events.desc: Open comms. Crew up, hang out, run whatever.

events.title: Fleet Op: Siege
events.desc: Capital fleet engagement. All hands on deck.
